reviews.review_title: Got kicked out to the Backrooms.
reviews.review_description: This game is chaotic - Moderator Thing

developer_response.body: It's called "Chaos" Monkeys for a reason

reviews.review_description:
Allow me to recount my recent encounter with a purported fan-made rendition of Gorilla Tag—a lamentable endeavor marked by an egregious lack of finesse and discernible craftsmanship.

First and foremost, I am compelled to denounce the lamentable state of the in-game textures, which, regrettably, bore the unmistakable mark of negligence. They were a disorienting amalgamation of pixelated confusion, akin to a nightmarish mosaic from the deepest abyss of the internet's forsaken corners. On occasion, I found myself questioning whether the splashes of color before me were intentional textures or mere capricious daubs of indistinct hue. This lack of visual refinement was nothing short of a vexatious eyesore, inviting doubts about the creator's commitment to even the most rudimentary standards of quality.

The lamentable travesty extended to the game's map design—a grotesque medley of diagonal aberrations that defied all principles of coherent spatial arrangement. Navigating this disorienting labyrinthine construct was nothing short of a migraine-inducing ordeal, a stark reminder of the creator's apparent ignorance regarding the fundamental elements that contribute to an engaging and enjoyable game environment.

Yet, perhaps the most damning indictment of this endeavor was the stark and desolate void that passed for a player community. In three separate attempts to immerse myself in this dismal creation, I was met with a haunting silence—a resounding testament to the universal consensus that shunned this abomination. The resounding absence of fellow players underscored the egregious chasm between this dismal rendition and the thriving communities of more refined Gorilla Tag adaptations.

In conclusion, this fan-made incarnation of Gorilla Tag is an affront to the discerning player's sensibilities. From the deplorable state of its textures to the bewildering chaos of its map design and the virtual ghost town that is its player base, it is a wretched offering best avoided.
I fed this game to my goldfish and then it drowned
best game i will kiss the owner because of how good it is

developer_response.body: Ay I'm still waiting for that kiss ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
